changelog: External reset button: a long press (~1.5 s) now reboots with an output-mode switch (Joypad ↔ MnK); a short press still performs a plain reboot
CIM: MIM aim-assist corrections (recoil/spline, Gauss, rapid-fire) can now be applied to the right stick of a passed-through controller
AIM: configurable key mappings and selectable mouse-to-stick assignment, saved on the device and configurable via the app
